capacity_convention.boundary: capacity total and growth factor are decided by D-014/PV-CAP, not by PV-PARAM
capacity_convention.recommended_path: label the later D-014 capacity artifact as DC kWp, AC kW, or another signed convention before PV-PARAM consumes it

irradiance_to_power_conversion.fallback_path: direct KNMI GHI scalar conversion only if PI explicitly signs the simplification and loss model
irradiance_to_power_conversion.pvgis_boundary: PVGIS-SARAH3 is qualitative sanity/provenance/calibration context, not a realized ALEA-001 weather member
irradiance_to_power_conversion.recommended_path: prefer a lightweight pvlib-style statistical plane-of-array route after PI signs decomposition/transposition/albedo and class treatment

candidate_routes_for_future_pi_choice: single aggregate PV fleet if IC-1 accepts aggregate component input
simple node-share allocation using a signed existing network/load denominator
post-first-experiment spatial refinement using registered local data only after new scope approval
node_allocation.recommended_path: keep first-experiment allocation as a separate signed rule with explicit normalization denominator and no roof/building geometry

performance_loss_treatment.recommended_path: sign either a transparent loss/performance-ratio source or an explicit PVGIS reference-loss mapping before executable use

scenario_consistency.recommended_path: require A-016 manifest check to reconcile CBS PV source year, II3050 scenario label, HP scenario, EV scenario, and 2035 planning layer

statistical_orientation_tilt_distributio.assumption_only_fallback: simple south/east/west/flat-style class prior only if explicitly signed as an assumption-only first-screen fallback
statistical_orientation_tilt_distributio.recommended_path: select a source-backed statistical class set, then sign class bins, representative azimuth/tilt angles, weights, and capacity-weighting convention
statistical_orientation_tilt_distributio.source_backed_candidate: D014-PV-ORIENTATION-TILT-VALUE-CHOICE-PACKET source-backed candidate remains unsigned until PI selects source and values

temperature_and_clipping_treatment.recommended_path: sign whether first experiment uses a module-temperature coefficient or an explicit no-temperature simplification, plus clipping convention

non_claims: No PV capacity value, II3050 growth factor, capacity convention, orientation/tilt bin, orientation/tilt weight, PR value, loss value, temperature coefficient, clipping rule, conversion formula, or node allocation is approved.
No PV generation, net-load, event detection, P(E), threshold run, capacity screen, manuscript result, or final paired HP/PV acceptance is produced.
No building, roof, location-level, 3DBAG, PV-map, or per-roof geometry workflow is implemented before the first experiment.
PVGIS remains qualitative sanity/provenance context only and is not a realized sampled WEATHER-001 path.

recommended_first_experiment_route_for_r.allocation: sign separately before node-level PV generation
recommended_first_experiment_route_for_r.capacity: use later signed D-014/PV-CAP artifact only
recommended_first_experiment_route_for_r.conversion: prefer signed lightweight statistical POA route; allow direct-GHI fallback only by explicit PI signature
recommended_first_experiment_route_for_r.losses_temperature_clipping: sign as part of PV-PARAM or successor before executable use
recommended_first_experiment_route_for_r.orientation_tilt: use later signed statistical class distribution only; no roof/building extraction

scope_guardrails.d014_capacity_route_separate: PV-CAP-001 CBS Alkmaar anchor scaled by signed II3050/scenario growth factor
scope_guardrails.weather_realization_boundary: WEATHER-001 KNMI is the realized weather path; PVGIS remains qualitative sanity/provenance only
